name: Coconut Shortbread Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup unsweetened shredded coconut (approximately 1 whole coconut)
recipeInstructions:
2 cups white flour
Combine the butter and brown sugar, mixing well until creamy.
Add vanilla and salt to the mixture.
Gradually mix in the shredded coconut until evenly distributed.
Knead the dough with your fingers until smooth.
Divide the dough into four equal parts and shape each portion into a roll about 1 inch or more in diameter.
Wrap each roll tightly in wax paper and refrigerate until firm, at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
Using a round cutter, cut the chilled rolls into rounds about 1/4 inch thick.
Optionally, press halves of nuts or pieces of coconut onto the top of each cookie. This is easier if you have a ring with a 1.5-inch diameter to contain the dough; gently press some dough against the nut to secure it in place.
Arrange the rounds on ungreased baking sheets, leaving space between them for spreading as they bake.
Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly brown and set.
